title: Oasis Ideal Floral Foam Maxlife Brick (Box contains 20 bricks)
description: From the manufacturer OASIS Ideal Floral Foam Maxlife Brick OASISFloral Foam Maxlife provides longer life for flowers - UP TO 50 per cent longer - than in previous floral foam. And, for the first time, it is the only floral foam in the industry proven to meet or beat flower life in a vase. Wet bricks feature quick saturation, low drainage, and guidelines for cutting, if you do not need a full brick. A labour saving product that saves time and trouble, and most important of all gives you the security of knowing that your flowers are secure and firmly placed in the design. Typical Uses To create flower arrangements where the foam provides support and a water source to the stems inserted into it. Product Features Cutting lines. Excellent water source. Quick saturation. Low drainage. Buying Options Customer Reviews — Price — no data Colour Green Shape Brick Material Wet Foam Type Wet Foam
